title: Abyssal fauna of the UK-1 polymetallic nodule exploration area, Clarion-Clipperton Zone
author: Wiklund, Helena
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Figure 21 - Leptochiton macleani Sirenko, 2015. NHM_446 voucher specimen. A Live specimen (lateral view) after recovery from the ROV scoop sample B Preserved specimen (ventro-lateral view) following DNA extraction C Dorsal view D surface detail E SEM of tegmentum surface and pores. Scale bars: 4 mm (A); 0.5 mm (D); 0.3 mm (E). Image attribution Glover, Taylor, Ikebe, Dahlgren & Wiklund, 2017.
